content.en:
A few days later.

The Kunwu Supreme summoned the Supremes of the Nine Supreme-level forces, and of course the Supremes could not go to the real body, but sent the incarnation to descend on the Holy City.

Holy city, in a palace.

The nine Supreme Incarnations of the Nine Supreme Powers appeared one after another, and the Kunwu Supreme represented the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to attend this meeting.

Among them, the representative of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is not the Mixed Yuan Supreme, but another Supreme - Jiangshan Supreme!

Although the Jiangshan Supreme is just an ordinary Supreme, it has the right to represent the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

"Kunwu Supreme, what about Ye Tian, what you revealed to us before is true, right? If it is really the supreme inheritance of the Life Ancient Tree and the Life Spirit Clan, then it is indeed qualified for us to come here to trade with Ye Tian. "

Divine Blade Supreme Dao.

Wuji Supreme said: "Ye Tian is just a galaxy level, I suggest that Ye Tian can hand it over directly, and then give him a little benefit casually, there is no need to have such a grand meeting to trade with him." "

Kunwu Supreme said with a smile: "Wuji Supreme, you are a little dissatisfied with Ye Tian's behavior last time he went to the Wuji Sword Sect, but don't forget, Ye Tian's talent is the strongest in the history of the universe, and he will definitely be able to become the strongest supreme in the universe in the future, and his potential is unlimited." Are you sure you want to offend Ye Tian, be careful that your Wuji Sword Sect will have a hard time in the future!"

"Ahem, just because I didn't say that!"

Wuji Supreme coughed dryly and said.

Obviously, he was also worried that the words of the Kungo Supreme would come true.

He can not take Ye Tian in his eyes now, but Ye Tian's potential is obvious to all, as long as Ye Tian does not fall, he will definitely not be Ye Tian's opponent in the future, and he will not even have the qualifications to become Ye Tian's opponent.

Once Ye Tian grows up, he will inevitably be the ruler of the human race, and his status is the same as that of the first god lord of the god race, and he has the absolute right to speak and decide.

Therefore, he really didn't dare to offend Ye Tian, what he said just now was just casual talk.

"I've already informed Ye Tian, he should be there soon!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to step into this conference room.

"I've seen all the Supremes!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Sit down!"

Kunwu Supreme said.

Ye Tian found an empty seat and sat down.

"Let's start the meeting!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Ye Tian, I told you the basic situation, but this time after all, it is you who are trading with the Nine Supreme-level forces and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, so you should talk about it carefully!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

Ye Tian nodded, and then spoke: "Ladies and gentlemen, I have discovered a inheritance world, where there is an ancient tree of life, and in that inheritance space, there is also a life elf clan life temple, and there is a life elf clan inheritance in the life temple, and I entered the life temple, successfully passed all the assessments they set, and obtained the supreme inheritance life god of the life temple. I want to trade this inheritance world to the nine supreme forces and the Terran Supreme Palace, so that you can share this inheritance world. However, I need to be paid the same amount as this deal!"

"What do you want?"

Divine Blade Supreme asked.

The supremes present were not afraid that Ye Tian would lie, after all, once Ye Tian lied, they could completely recover those rewards.

Besides, Ye Tian was only at the galaxy level now, and he would never dare to make such a joke with these supremes.

"First, I want some precious texts of the Nine Supreme Powers and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and I just need to print the version or browse it once. "

"Second, I want enough resources, resources that can be cultivated from the Great God level all the way to the Domination Realm. How many resources are needed can be discussed later. "

"Third, I want to enter the Holy Illusion Realm of the Human Race to cultivate!"

As soon as Ye Tian finished speaking, the Wuji Supreme shouted: "Absolutely not, we can agree to the first two conditions, but the Holy Illusion Realm is absolutely not." You know what the Holy Illusion is, how can it be opened casually. Only when the Juggernaut is about to attack the Supreme, and you need to pay a huge price to be able to open the Holy Illusion, you want to enter the Holy Illusion, you can't help but think too beautifully!"

Ye Tian saw that the Wuji Supreme reacted so much, and he didn't panic at all, and said: "Wuji Supreme, I know that the cost of opening the Supreme Holy Illusion Realm is high, but the value of the Chaos Ancient Tree and the Life Divine Code is so great, it is definitely worth it! I can show you the Supreme One-third of the content of the Life Divine Codex, and then you Supreme Ones decide whether to agree to my conditions, how about it?"

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

......

The Supremes discussed with each other for a while, and then they all nodded in agreement.

No matter how Ye Tian boasted about the Life Divine Codex, they hadn't seen it after all, so they couldn't give it a specific value.

So, let's see how the Life Divine Code is before they can set the price.

Otherwise, they wouldn't have paid such a huge price.

Ye Tian took out one crystal ball after another, and then imprinted one-third of the contents of the Life Divine Code into these crystal balls one by one.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to succeed.

This kind of imprint is just a simple brand, there is no way to keep it forever, or it will dissipate after a long time.

But Ye Tian is just showing you the Supremes, and he doesn't need to keep it.

Whoa!!

One by one, the Supreme received Ye Tian's crystal ball, and his divine sense probed into it to check the contents of the Life Divine Codex.

Soon, they were attracted by the content of the Divine Book of Life, and they became addicted to it one by one.

After a long time, the Wuji Supreme withdrew from the content of the Life Divine Scripture and muttered, "What a Life Divine Codex, such a mysterious life avenue, it is really extraordinary!"

The other Supremes also showed excited expressions one by one, eager to get the complete Life Divine Codex.

For these supreme beings, the value of the Life Divine Codex to them is also incomparably great.

It is almost difficult for their strength to improve, and when their strength cannot be improved, it is often necessary to increase their life-preserving ability, but how difficult it is to increase their life-preserving ability.

After all, their own life-saving ability is already very strong, and it is too difficult to increase their life-saving ability on the basis of today!

But now, they see the canon of life and the hope of increasing their ability to save their lives.

"It is said that the Protoss also has a powerful life codex, it is estimated that it is not as good as this life codex, once we obtain this life codex, our life-saving ability will be strengthened, which is equivalent to an increase in strength. "

Divine Blade Supreme Dao.

Immediately, the Supremes began to discuss.

"Everyone, the Chaos Ancient Tree and this Life Divine Book are extremely valuable, do you want to agree to Ye Tian's request?"

"The first two requirements are enough, but the cost of opening the Holy Illusion Realm is too great, and many Terran powerhouses who dominate the extreme are queuing up, and it will take a long time before they can enter the Holy Illusion Realm. And those masters are willing to pay a certain price, and Ye Tian wants to enter the Holy Illusion Realm for free, this ......"

"Let's agree, opening the Holy Illusion Realm can help Ye Tian, and it's not a waste. We can make a request, that is, in the future, when Ye Tian reaches the ultimate of domination, the Holy Illusion Realm will no longer be open to him. In this way, it is equivalent to opening the Holy Illusion Realm for Ye Tian in advance, what do you think?"

"Okay, so be it!"

After the discussion, the Divine Blade Supreme spoke as a representative: "Ye Tian, a few of us have discussed it and agreed to your request. However, it is impossible for you to show too many of the precious classics of the Nine Supreme Powers and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and there are also resource issues, so we all need to discuss them in detail. "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Next, Ye Tian discussed with the major supremes for nearly a day.

In the end, Ye Tian won enough resources and enough precious classics for himself, these classics were very precious, and they were not accessible at all when he was His Highness in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and they were also impossible to access now.

But now, he can browse these precious texts for free, which has unimaginable benefits for expanding his horizons and can also increase his background.

In the future, he will even create his own myriad secret techniques based on these texts.

This is the real wealth!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian signed an agreement with the Supremes and set the rules.

In the following month, the Nine Supreme-level Forces and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race sent some resources and the imprinted versions of the precious classics.

And Ye Tian also said that this inheritance world was discovered by him and Zhou Tian, so those precious classics can be browsed by Zhou Tian.

Other than that, no one else is allowed to view these precious texts, and they must be destroyed afterwards.

this day.

The Supremes asked Ye Tian: "Except for the Holy Illusion Realm, everything else has been given to you, now it's time to tell me where that inheritance world is, right?"

Ye Tiandao: "In the ruins of the Tiemu Clan. "

Immediately, Ye Tian talked about the matter between the Tiemu clan and Zhou Tian.

At this time, the Kunwu Supreme suddenly realized: "It turns out that the Tiemu Clan attacked Zhou Tian because of this incident! Zhou Tian didn't even report this matter!"

Ye Tian smiled and said, "Kunwu Supreme, if the high-level of the human race is willing to resurrect Zhou Tian, Zhou Tian will definitely report it." But Zhou Tian was resurrected by the Lord of Cangyu, and it was me who contributed to the effort. In addition, if you report on Sunday, although you will get benefits, it will definitely not be as much as it is now!"

"That's right!"

Kunwu Supreme said helplessly.

Next, the Supremes quickly locked the inheritance world, and completely sent people to occupy the Temu ruins, and protected the inheritance world.

After that, Ye Tian didn't care.

He then went to Zhou Tian and gave Zhou Tian most of the resources, and all those precious classics were also browsed by Zhou Tian.

After all, Ye Tian also gained the benefit of entering the Holy Illusion Realm, but Zhou Tian did not have this benefit.

Therefore, Ye Tian couldn't let Zhou Tian suffer, so he could only make concessions in resources.

But on the whole, Ye Tian still earned!

After everything was ready, Ye Tian was ready to enter the Holy Illusion Realm!
